title: Contract 1 — classifier output (per command) (RFC-008 F21)
description: One NDJSON line per classifier emission. label vocabulary closure (label in taxonomy.labels[].id) is a RUNTIME hard-reject (F3) — the meta-schema only constrains shape.

target.description: path or URL the action targets; empty string for stateless commands

reason.description: stable snake_case id; used as marker-cache key
